body: BEGIN IF x > 0 THEN y := 1; END IF; END
BEGIN IF x > 0 THEN y := 1; ELSE y := 2; END IF; END
BEGIN IF x > 0 THEN y := 1; ELSIF x < 0 THEN y := 2; END IF; END

comment: IF with multiple ELSIF and ELSE
body: BEGIN IF a THEN x := 1; ELSIF b THEN x := 2; ELSIF c THEN x := 3; ELSE x := 4; END IF; END

comment: IF with five ELSIF arms (stresses the elsif list append)
body: BEGIN IF a THEN x := 1; ELSIF b THEN x := 2; ELSIF c THEN x := 3; ELSIF d THEN x := 4; ELSIF e THEN x := 5; ELSIF f THEN x := 6; END IF; END
BEGIN IF a THEN END IF; END
deparse:
BEGIN
IF a THEN
END IF;
END

body: BEGIN IF a THEN IF b THEN x := 1; END IF; END IF; END

comment: condition with parens and function call
body: BEGIN IF (count(*) > 0) THEN x := 1; END IF; END
BEGIN LOOP x := 1; END LOOP; END

comment: labeled LOOP with matching end label
body: BEGIN <<l>> LOOP x := 1; END LOOP l; END
BEGIN LOOP END LOOP; END
deparse:
BEGIN
LOOP
END LOOP;
END

body: BEGIN WHILE x > 0 LOOP x := x - 1; END LOOP; END
BEGIN <<w>> WHILE x > 0 LOOP x := x - 1; END LOOP w; END
BEGIN LOOP EXIT; END LOOP; END
BEGIN LOOP EXIT WHEN x > 10; END LOOP; END
BEGIN <<l>> LOOP EXIT l; END LOOP l; END
BEGIN <<l>> LOOP EXIT l WHEN done; END LOOP l; END
BEGIN LOOP CONTINUE; END LOOP; END
BEGIN LOOP CONTINUE WHEN x < 0; END LOOP; END
BEGIN WHILE x > 0 LOOP IF x = 5 THEN EXIT; END IF; x := x - 1; END LOOP; END

comment: loop end label mismatch is an error
body: BEGIN <<l>> LOOP x := 1; END LOOP wrong; END

comment: end label on unlabeled loop is an error
body: BEGIN LOOP x := 1; END LOOP oops; END
error: end label "oops" specified for unlabeled block

comment: a stray ; before THEN is an error, not swallowed into the condition
body: BEGIN IF 1; THEN NULL; END IF; END
